summary: Frontend-only testing of 3 new features: CSV Export, Framer Motion transitions, and Interactive Scoring Calculator. All features working correctly. CSV Export button visible and functional on Live Testing tab. Framer Motion page transitions smooth across all 8 tabs with no console errors. Scoring calculator correctly computes bid × relevance × timeBonus × deviceBonus (verified: $4.50 × 1.4 × 1.25 × 1.1 = 8.66).
passed_tests: CSV Export button (data-testid='csv-export-btn') visible on Live Testing tab
CSV Export button triggers download when clicked
Framer Motion AnimatePresence wraps all tab content with mode='wait'
Tab transition to Live Testing (test-content) renders correctly
Tab transition to Architecture (architecture-content) renders correctly
Tab transition to Optimizations (optimizations-content) renders correctly
Tab transition to Terraform (terraform-content) renders correctly
Tab transition to Course (course-content) renders correctly
Tab transition to About Matt (about-content) renders correctly
Tab transition to Bulava (bulava-content) renders correctly
Tab transition to Home (home-content) renders correctly
No framer-motion console errors during any tab transitions
No console errors at all during tab navigation
Scoring Calculator component (data-testid='scoring-calculator') renders on Architecture tab
Bid slider (data-testid='calc-bid-slider') functional - adjusts bid amount $1-$10
Hour slider (data-testid='calc-hour-slider') functional - adjusts time 0-23
Content category buttons (sports, news, entertainment, finance, lifestyle) selectable
Ad category buttons (sportswear, fintech, streaming, insurance, beauty, travel) selectable
Device buttons (mobile, desktop) selectable
Final Score (data-testid='calc-result') updates in real-time
Score calculation correct: $4.50 × 1.4 (sports+sportswear) × 1.25 (evening) × 1.1 (mobile) = 8.66
Calculation breakdown displays all multiplier components
Context badges display relevance match and time bonus info
Test History panel shows 44+ runs from previous testing
All 8 tab data-testid selectors present and functional
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test history
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features added: 1) CSV Export button on Live Testing tab (data-testid='csv-export-btn') exports test results and history to CSV. 2) Framer Motion page transitions (pageVariants with opacity/y animations) on all 8 tabs wrapped in AnimatePresence mode='wait'. 3) Interactive Scoring Calculator on Architecture tab with sliders for bid ($1-$10) and hour (0-23), plus button selectors for content category, ad category, and device type. Formula: score = bid × relevance × timeBonus × deviceBonus. Key testids: scoring-calculator, calc-result, calc-bid-slider, calc-hour-slider. All features verified working with no console errors.

csv_export.details: Export CSV button visible on Live Testing tab, triggers download when clicked

framer_motion.details: All 8 tabs have smooth fade/slide transitions, no console errors

scoring_calculator.details: Bid slider, hour slider, content/ad category buttons, device toggle all update final score in real-time. Calculation verified: $4.50 × 1.4 × 1.25 × 1.1 = 8.66
